sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Credit Acceptance Corp. (NASDAQ:CACC) Reports Mixed Q4 2025 Results
feed.summary: Credit Acceptance Corp. (NASDAQ:CACC) released mixed Q4 2025 results, with diluted EPS of $11.35 surpassing estimates but revenue of $579.9 million falling short. The company reported a decline in loan volumes and an increase in legal expenses, leading to a neutral market reaction despite exceeding earnings expectations. Key challenges include softer credit performance in recent loan vintages and ongoing legal costs, while the company focuses on product initiatives and capital returns to shareholders.

feed.title: Why Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) Dipped More Than Broader Market Today
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) stock fell 1.61% today, lagging the broader market despite future earnings and revenue growth predictions. The company's upcoming earnings report on February 3, 2026, is highly anticipated, with Zacks Consensus Estimates forecasting significant EPS and revenue increases. Despite positive analyst forecast revisions and a "Hold" Zacks Rank, its Forward P/E ratio suggests it's trading at a premium compared to its industry.

feed.title: American Express in charts: Q4 network volumes +9%, provisions for credit losses +9.4% Y/Y
feed.summary: This article provides key financial performance indicators for American Express in Q4, highlighting a 9% increase in network volumes and a 9.4% year-over-year rise in provisions for credit losses. The content, being "MSN", suggests a brief overview or summary of these financial results.

feed.title: PPL Corporation to Conduct Webcast on 2025 Earnings Results
feed.summary: PPL Corporation announced it will release its consolidated fourth-quarter and year-end 2025 earnings results on Friday, February 20. The company will host a webcast and conference call at 11 a.m. Eastern Time for financial analysts, discussing quarterly results and its business outlook. A replay of the event will be available for 90 days on PPL's investor relations website.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Swings to a Loss on Charges
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive reported a loss in the fourth quarter due to a significant charge related to its struggling skin-health business. Despite the loss, the company's sales increased to $5.23 billion, surpassing Wall Street expectations. This financial downturn contrasts with a profit of $739 million in the same period last year.

feed.title: Moderna appoints David Berman as new chief development officer
feed.summary: Moderna has appointed David Berman, M.D., Ph.D., as its new Chief Development Officer, effective March 2, 2026. Berman, who has extensive experience in immunotherapy development, will join the Executive Committee and report to CEO Stéphane Bancel. This appointment comes as Moderna navigates financial challenges, despite recent stock growth and strategic partnerships.

feed.title: J&J gets fraud claims tied to talc bankruptcy tossed (JNJ)
feed.summary: A New Jersey federal judge has dismissed a lawsuit alleging that Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) committed fraud by using bankruptcy to settle tens of thousands of claims. These claims asserted that the company's talc-based products caused cancer. This ruling is a significant development in the ongoing legal challenges faced by J&J regarding its talc products.

feed.title: PNC Foundation Contributes $2 Million for New Snow Removal Equipment
feed.summary: The PNC Foundation has granted $2 million to the City of Pittsburgh to acquire new snow removal equipment. This donation will enable the Department of Public Works to purchase 15 new vehicles, bringing their total new equipment to over 50 pieces, enhancing the city's preparedness and response to severe winter weather following a recent record-setting snowstorm.

feed.title: Equifax Launches Credit Abuse Risk Model to Help Protect Lenders Against the Rising Financial Impact of First-Party Fraud
feed.summary: Equifax has launched a new predictive model called Credit Abuse Risk to help lenders combat first-party fraud, such as loan stacking and credit washing. This model uses FCRA-regulated data and behavioral insights to detect atypical credit activity, allowing lenders to make more confident decisions. It aims to reduce fraud-related costs and maintain credit availability by integrating with Equifax's existing fraud defense strategies.

feed.title: Equifax tool spots loan stacking and credit washing before approval
feed.summary: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) has launched its Credit Abuse Risk model, a predictive tool using FCRA-regulated data to detect first-party fraud like loan stacking and credit washing. This new model provides FCRA-compliant scores with adverse action reason codes and real-time behavioral insights to help lenders make more confident decisions during prequalification, origination, and portfolio review. It integrates with existing fraud defenses, including synthetic identity tools, to offer a comprehensive approach to mitigating rising financial impacts of first-party fraud.

feed.title: Church & Dwight Logs Sales Growth
feed.summary: Church & Dwight reported sales growth in the fourth quarter, with net sales increasing to $1.64 billion from $1.58 billion in the prior year. This growth was driven by an increase in personal care product sales, which counteracted a decline in household product revenue. The company posted a profit of $143.5 million, or 60 cents per share, for the quarter.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams: Solid Margins but Muted Growth and Limited Near-Term Catalysts Justify Neutral (Hold) Rating
feed.summary: Bank of America Securities analyst Matthew DeYoe reiterated a Hold rating on Sherwin-Williams (NYSE: SHW) with a price target of $370.00. Despite the company modestly beating Q4 earnings expectations due to improved margins and cost control, full-year profit growth was minimal, and the 2026 earnings guidance appears restrained. Factors such as integration costs, higher raw material expenses, and increased interest costs, combined with limited near-term catalysts and a muted housing outlook, justify the Neutral (Hold) stance.

feed.title: Dr. David Berman to Join Moderna as Chief Development Officer
feed.summary: Moderna, Inc. announced that Dr. David Berman will join as the company's Chief Development Officer, effective March 2, 2026. He will report to CEO Stéphane Bancel and focus on advancing Moderna's mRNA medicine pipeline across various diseases. Dr. Jacqueline Miller will step down as Chief Medical Officer but will remain as a consultant for the transition.

feed.title: Regeneron beats quarterly profit estimates on Dupixent strength
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals exceeded fourth-quarter profit estimates, driven by strong demand for its eczema treatment, Dupixent. While Dupixent sales, co-developed with Sanofi, continue to grow, the company faces pressure as its eye disease drug Eylea sees declining sales due to competition and upcoming patent expiry for Dupixent in 2031. Regeneron's total revenue reached $3.88 billion with an adjusted profit of $11.44 per share, surpassing analyst expectations.

feed.title: Mizuho Upgrades Applied Materials (AMAT) to Outperform on Global WFE Tailwinds
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Vijay Rakesh upgraded Applied Materials (AMAT) to Outperform with a $370 price target, citing robust global Wafer Fab Equipment (WFE) tailwinds. The firm anticipates significant WFE spending growth in 2026 and 2027, driven by increased capital expenditure from TSMC and Intel, and strong demand from high-bandwidth memory. This positive outlook positions AMAT, a leading WFE supplier, to benefit from accelerated ex-China WFE revenues.

feed.title: Meridian Management Co. Has $5.89 Million Stock Position in Adobe Inc. $ADBE
feed.summary: Meridian Management Co. significantly increased its stake in Adobe Inc. ($ADBE) by 48.4%, bringing its total holding to 16,706 shares valued at $5.89 million, making Adobe its 18th largest holding. Despite strong earnings that beat consensus estimates and positive guidance for Q1 and FY2026, Adobe's stock has faced pressure due to analyst downgrades, insider selling, and concerns over its acquisition of Semrush at a high premium. The company's stock currently has a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $397.19.

feed.title: Dr. David Berman to Join Moderna as Chief Development Officer
feed.summary: Moderna, Inc. has announced the appointment of Dr. David Berman as its new Chief Development Officer, effective March 2, 2026. Dr. Berman brings over two decades of experience in clinical-stage immunotherapies, particularly in oncology and infectious diseases, having previously held senior roles at ImmunoCore, AstraZeneca, and Bristol-Myers Squibb. He will succeed Dr. Jacqueline Miller, who will transition to a consultancy role.

feed.title: Meridian Management Co. Trims Stock Holdings in Generac Holdings Inc. $GNRC
feed.summary: Meridian Management Co. reduced its stake in Generac Holdings Inc. by 23.2% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 8,023 shares. Additionally, Generac's CEO, Aaron Jagdfeld, sold 5,000 shares in November, reducing his direct ownership. Generac missed Q3 earnings and revenue expectations but holds a "Moderate Buy" analyst rating with an average target price of $195.29.

feed.title: S&P 500 Futures Fall in Premarket Trading; Sandisk, Deckers Outdoor Lead
feed.summary: S&P 500 futures are down in premarket trading. Among individual stocks, Sandisk Corp. (SNDK) showed a significant gain of 23.6%, while Deckers Outdoor Corp. (DECK) rose by 11.8% ahead of the market open.

feed.title: Verizon's subscriber additions blow past estimates; posts strong results and forecast (VZ:NYSE)
feed.summary: Verizon (VZ) exceeded Q4 estimates for subscriber additions, revenue, and earnings, driven by strong postpaid phone net adds. The company provided a robust 2026 forecast, including expectations of 750,000 to 1 million postpaid phone net additions and adjusted EPS between $4.90 and $4.95, signaling continued growth despite concerns about weaker profit margins due to elevated equipment costs.

feed.title: Immunotherapy veteran David Berman to steer drug development at Moderna
feed.summary: Moderna has appointed Dr. David Berman as its new Chief Development Officer, effective March 2, 2026, where he will join the Executive Committee and report to CEO Stéphane Bancel. Dr. Berman brings extensive experience in immunotherapy and oncology, having previously led the development and approval of the first T-cell receptor therapeutic. His appointment is expected to strengthen Moderna's clinical development across its diverse pipeline, focusing on infectious diseases, cancer, and rare diseases, while outgoing CMO Dr. Jacqueline Miller will assist with the transition.

feed.title: DHT Holdings to sell 2007-built crude oil tanker for $51.5 million
feed.summary: DHT Holdings has announced the sale of its 2007-built crude oil tanker, DHT Bauhinia, for $51.5 million, expecting a $34.2 million gain. This sale is part of its fleet management strategy, which also includes the recent acquisition of a new VLCC and the sale of two other vessels. The company's shares are trading near their 52-week high, reflecting recent strategic movements and strong earnings in Q4 2025.

feed.title: Bit Digital Shifts Focus from Bitcoin Mining to AI and Ethereum
feed.summary: Bit Digital is completely abandoning Bitcoin mining to focus on investments in Ethereum (ETH) and AI-related strategies. The company's CEO, Sam Tabar, stated that mining became less profitable compared to opportunities in AI infrastructure and active participation in the Ethereum ecosystem. Bit Digital has accumulated a significant amount of ETH, mostly staked, and has expanded its presence in the AI and high-performance computing sectors through subsidiaries and partnerships.

feed.title: Cheer Holding Retains Nasdaq Listing After Share Consolidation Restores Bid Price Compliance
feed.summary: Cheer Holding (CHR) has successfully retained its Nasdaq listing after implementing a 50-for-1 share consolidation. This action addressed non-compliance issues stemming from its stock trading below the $1.00 minimum bid price and being subject to Nasdaq's low-priced stocks rule. The share consolidation and subsequent presentation to a Nasdaq Hearings Panel resulted in the company regaining compliance on January 27, 2026.

feed.title: Chevron Corp (NYSE:CVX) Beats Earnings Estimates with Record Production Despite Lower Prices
feed.summary: Chevron Corp (NYSE:CVX) reported Q4 2025 financial results, beating earnings estimates with adjusted EPS of $1.52 against an expected $1.47, driven by record production and cost management, despite slightly missing revenue forecasts at $46.87 billion. The company achieved record worldwide net oil-equivalent production of 4.045 million barrels per day, successfully integrated Hess Corporation, and returned $27.1 billion to shareholders. Despite lower year-over-year oil prices and a revenue shortfall, the market reacted neutrally, balancing strong operational performance against commodity cycle pressures.

feed.title: CHURCH & DWIGHT ($CHD) Releases Q4 2025 Earnings
feed.summary: CHURCH & DWIGHT ($CHD) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, with an EPS of $0.86 which beat estimates, but revenue of $1.644 billion missed expectations. The article also details recent insider trading activity showing purchases, significant hedge fund movements, congressional stock trading, and current analyst ratings and price targets for CHD.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corp (NYSE:XOM) Reports Q4 2025 Earnings Beat Amid Record Production and Refining Strength
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp (NYSE:XOM) reported Q4 2025 earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations, driven by strong refining performance and record production, particularly from the Permian Basin and Guyana. Despite a full-year profit decline from 2024 due to lower crude prices and weaker chemical margins, the company achieved record net production and significant shareholder returns. While the market reaction was muted initially, ExxonMobil's management emphasized its transformation into a more resilient, technology-led business with structurally stronger earnings potential.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive gains after international sales shine (CL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) shares rose after the company exceeded fourth-quarter earnings estimates. Revenue increased by 5.9% to $5.23 billion, driven by a 2.2% rise in organic sales. This performance was achieved despite a negative impact from lower private label pet volume.

feed.title: Valley Wealth Managers Inc. Invests $21.07 Million in Delta Air Lines, Inc. $DAL
feed.summary: Valley Wealth Managers Inc. has acquired a new position of 371,257 shares in Delta Air Lines, valued at approximately $21.07 million, making up 0.06% of the company. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for DAL with an average price target of $80.47, despite recent insider selling by corporate executives. Institutional investors collectively own about 69.9% of the stock.

feed.title: American Express: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: American Express Co. reported fourth-quarter net income of $2.46 billion, or $3.53 per share, which fell short of analyst expectations of $3.54 per share. However, the company's revenue of $18.98 billion surpassed Street forecasts. American Express also provided a full-year earnings outlook of $17.30 to $17.90 per share.

feed.title: Pittenger & Anderson Inc. Sells 32,027 Shares of Church & Dwight Co., Inc. $CHD
feed.summary: Pittenger & Anderson Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) by selling 32,027 shares, decreasing its total holdings by 34.2% to 61,704 shares valued at $5.407 million. This comes as Church & Dwight reported Q3 earnings that slightly exceeded expectations with an EPS of $0.86 and revenue of $1.64 billion. The stock currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $98.85.

feed.title: AON PLC-CLASS A (NYSE:AON) Stock Falls on Q4 Revenue Miss Despite EPS Beat
feed.summary: AON PLC-CLASS A reported mixed Q4 2025 financial results, with non-GAAP EPS exceeding estimates but revenue falling short. Despite the EPS beat, the revenue miss led to a negative pre-market reaction, with the stock falling approximately 2.6%. The market's focus has shifted to the company's ability to re-accelerate revenue growth to meet Wall Street's Q1 and full-year 2026 estimates.

feed.title: Ritter Daniher Financial Advisory LLC DE Acquires Shares of 15,954 The Charles Schwab Corporation $SCHW
feed.summary: Ritter Daniher Financial Advisory LLC DE initiated a new position in The Charles Schwab Corporation, purchasing 15,954 shares valued at approximately $1.523 million in Q3. The Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE: SCHW) reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations with $1.39 EPS and $6.34 billion in revenue, and subsequently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.32 per share. The company also announced its FY2026 EPS guidance of 5.700–5.800, while institutional investors hold a significant 84.38% of the stock.

feed.title: Pittenger & Anderson Inc. Acquires 66,164 Shares of RTX Corporation $RTX
feed.summary: Pittenger & Anderson Inc. significantly increased its stake in RTX Corporation by 137.1% during the third quarter, acquiring an additional 66,164 shares to hold a total of 114,431 shares worth approximately $19.15 million. This coincides with RTX reporting a strong Q4 beat with $24.24 billion in revenue and $1.55 EPS, leading management to raise its FY-2026 guidance. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target of around $198.89, and institutional investors collectively own about 86.5% of the stock.

feed.title: Regeneron: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. (REGN) reported strong fourth-quarter results, exceeding Wall Street expectations for both profit and revenue. The biopharmaceutical company posted a profit of $844.6 million, or $11.44 per share when adjusted, on revenues of $3.88 billion. For the full year, Regeneron's profit reached $4.5 billion with $14.34 billion in revenue.

feed.title: Pittenger & Anderson Inc. Has $26.81 Million Stock Holdings in ResMed Inc. $RMD
feed.summary: Pittenger & Anderson Inc. has increased its stake in ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) by 4.4% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 97,952 shares valued at approximately $26.81 million. This makes ResMed the institutional investor's 24th largest holding, representing 1.0% of its portfolio. The move follows strong Q2 results for ResMed, which beat EPS estimates and reported 11% revenue growth, leading analysts to maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of around $296.

feed.title: Scion Asset Management LLC Has $17.79 Million Stock Holdings in lululemon athletica inc. $LULU
feed.summary: Scion Asset Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in lululemon athletica inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) by 77.8% in Q3, selling 350,000 shares but still retaining 100,000 shares valued at approximately $17.79 million. Despite lululemon beating quarterly earnings estimates and reporting strong profitability, the stock has seen a decline, and analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with a consensus target price of $227.57. Insider selling also occurred, with Celeste Burgoyne reducing her holding by over 71%.

feed.title: How Technology is Rewriting C-suite Exec Responsibilities
feed.summary: Technological advancements are rapidly changing C-suite executive responsibilities, prompting companies like The Coca-Cola Company and Nike to reorganize their leadership structures. Coca-Cola appointed its first Chief Digital Officer to integrate digital strategy across the enterprise, removing it from the CFO's remit. Nike eliminated the CTO role, integrating technology leadership under the COO to embed innovation more seamlessly into operations, reflecting a broader trend where digital capability is seen as essential for growth rather than a separate function.

feed.title: Air Products & Chemicals Inc (NYSE:APD) Beats Q1 2026 Estimates as Market Focuses on Long-Term Projects
feed.summary: Air Products & Chemicals Inc (NYSE:APD) exceeded Wall Street's Q1 2026 estimates with an EPS of $3.16 and revenue of $3.10 billion, demonstrating strong operational execution. Despite the beat, the market reaction was positive but restrained, indicating investor focus remains on the company's long-term, capital-intensive hydrogen and clean energy projects. The report reaffirms the strength of its core business, providing a solid foundation as the company progresses with its strategic growth initiatives.

feed.title: Knights of Columbus Asset Advisors LLC Acquires 87,417 Shares of First Horizon Corporation $FHN
feed.summary: Knights of Columbus Asset Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in First Horizon Corporation by 44.6%, purchasing 87,417 additional shares. This transaction brings their total holdings to 283,450 shares, valued at approximately $6.41 million. The article also notes insider selling by two executives, positive quarterly earnings results, a share buyback program, and an increased dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for FHN.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO Shares Sold by Knights of Columbus Asset Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Knights of Columbus Asset Advisors LLC reduced its stake in Cisco Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ:CSCO) by 18.2% in the third quarter, while other hedge funds adjusted their positions with some increasing their holdings. Despite this, analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with upgrades from Evercore ISI and Zacks, and a consensus price target of $86.81. The company also announced a quarterly dividend and provided strong FY2026 EPS guidance, although insider activity showed net selling.

feed.title: American Express Stock Slips After Earnings. It’s Having a Rocky Start to 2026.
feed.summary: American Express (AXP) shares fell after the company announced quarterly earnings that slightly missed analyst estimates. The credit-card giant's 2026 outlook, which includes revenue growth of 9% to 10%, met Wall Street's expectations, but the stock is still experiencing a rocky start to the year.

feed.title: Motorola Solutions, Inc. $MSI Stock Holdings Increased by Knights of Columbus Asset Advisors LLC
feed.summary: Knights of Columbus Asset Advisors LLC has significantly increased its stake in Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) by 66.0%, now holding 20,225 shares valued at approximately $9.25 million. Motorola Solutions recently exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, reporting an EPS of $4.06 and revenue of $3.01 billion, and also raised its quarterly dividend to $1.21. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus among analysts with an average target price near $491.86.

feed.title: Brown & Brown, Inc. $BRO is Tandem Investment Advisors Inc.'s 6th Largest Position
feed.summary: Tandem Investment Advisors Inc. significantly increased its stake in Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) by 69.7% in Q3, making it their 6th largest holding. Despite this institutional confidence and a Q4 EPS beat, the company faced a revenue miss, multiple price target cuts, and a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts, alongside an investor probe, leading to increased near-term downside risk. Management, however, outlined positive future guidance including a 2026 margin target of 32–37% and significant synergies from an integration, while also declaring a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Ritter Daniher Financial Advisory LLC DE Buys Shares of 309 Booking Holdings Inc. $BKNG
feed.summary: Ritter Daniher Financial Advisory LLC DE recently acquired 309 shares of Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG), valued at approximately $1.67 million, marking a new stake in the company. Booking Holdings reported strong quarterly earnings, exceeding analyst expectations with EPS of $99.50 and revenue growth of 12.7% year-over-year. Despite significant institutional ownership and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, recent insider selling activity has also been noted.

feed.title: Pittenger & Anderson Inc. Increases Holdings in Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET

Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus on ANET, with an average price target of $164.44.

feed.title: Knights of Columbus Asset Advisors LLC Invests $7.73 Million in Lowe's Companies, Inc. $LOW

feed.title: Knights of Columbus Asset Advisors LLC Has $10.42 Million Stock Position in Intuit Inc. $INTU
feed.summary: Knights of Columbus Asset Advisors LLC increased its stake in Intuit Inc. to 15,258 shares, valued at $10.42 million, during Q3. feed.title: Pittenger & Anderson Inc. Grows Holdings in Intuit Inc. $INTU
